name: fit-web-tool
description: Simple web tool to draw a route on a map and generate a FIT running activity file

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist');" && npx ncc build server.js -o . --minify && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('index.js')) fs.renameSync('index.js', 'server_bundled.cjs')" && npx pkg server_bundled.cjs --output dist/fit-tool.exe --targets node18-win-x64 --config package.json
